ddx.description:
AI generates a differential diagnosis list with ICD-11 codes, confidence levels, and supporting evidence.

Click a diagnosis card to view diagnostic criteria, recommended tests, treatment options, and references.
ddx.title: Differential Diagnosis

insights.description:
As the consultation progresses, AI generates a real-time summary, key findings, red flags, and an action checklist.

Select text by dragging to leave inline comments. The AI will re-analyze based on your feedback.
insights.title: Live Insights

keywords.description:
When recording ends, AI automatically identifies clinically significant terms and color-codes them.

Symptoms, diagnoses, medications, findings, and vitals are highlighted separately.
keywords.title: Diagnostic Keyword Highlighting

noteInput.description:
Type text notes or attach medical images such as X-rays and lab results.

Notes appear in the timeline, and when sent, AI re-analyzes insights and differential diagnoses.
noteInput.title: Send Notes

record.description:
A structured medical record is automatically generated from the conversation.

Chief complaint, HPI, medications, ROS, past history, and vitals remain editable, and you can regenerate the record at any time.
record.title: Consultation Record

research.description:
Ask AI medical questions based on the current consultation context.

It searches medical databases including PubMed, ICD-11, and Europe PMC to provide evidence-based answers with citations.
research.title: Research

settings.description:
Configure speech recognition language, audio processing options, and theme.

Changes take effect from the next recording session.
settings.title: Settings

toolbar.description: Collapse or expand the transcript panel, download PDF or send email, configure knowledge connectors, and test the pipeline with simulations.
toolbar.title: Toolbar

transcript.description:
Speech is transcribed to text in real time.

After enough utterances, speakers are automatically identified and separated into doctor and patient turns.
transcript.title: Live Voice Transcription
